headline: Super vs ChatGPT — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs ChatGPT. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs ChatGPT

summary: ChatGPT is a world‑class general assistant with fast iteration across writing, research, images, voice, and lightweight automation. Super is purpose‑built for people who want a personal AI agent that actually operates a computer — and reuses a computer‑use cache so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper over time. This page compares where each shines, cites recent reporting, and places Super in the broader agent landscape (including Gemini, Grok, Siri, Folk, and Orchids).
